title: Messages
subtitle: Messages recommended based on what you need to do with each contact. Use them as-is or create your own versions.
variablesHint: They are replaced automatically when sending — in the subject, headline, message and button.

variables.produse: List of products in the offer

needs_offer.label: 📨 First offer
needs_offer.desc: Messages for sending the first offer

needs_followup.label: 🔄 Follow-up
needs_followup.desc: Messages to follow up after an offer

first_order.label: 🎉 New client
first_order.desc: Welcome messages after the first order

reorder.label: 🔁 Reorder
reorder.desc: Messages for the monthly order / restock

headlinePlaceholderNew: e.g. A special offer for you
headlinePlaceholderEdit: e.g. Did you see my offer?
bodyPlaceholderNew: e.g. Hi {{nume}}, I have something special for you...
bodyPlaceholderEdit: e.g. Hi {{nume}}, I'm following up on the offer I sent {{zile}} days ago...
attachHint: They appear automatically as buttons in the email when you send this message (you can adjust them when sending).
noResources: You don't have any resources yet. Add them from the „Resources” page.
saveError: The change could not be saved. Please try again.
deleteError: The message could not be deleted. Please try again.
deleteErrorInUse: This message was already used in a send, so it can't be deleted yet. Apply the database update (FK ON DELETE SET NULL) and then try again.
emptyHint: Tap „+ New message” to create your first message.
